---
title: 'Who Am I?'
date: '2016-05-29T03:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '228710882396321177'
blogger_filename: '/p/who-am-i.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami-92ce727249f9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami-fa05c7a308b4.jpg" width="153" /></a></div>
My name is Darrell Wolfe, and I'm a Multipotentilite (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I grew up in the Palm Springs area of Southern California (Indio, CA). After my wife and I married, we relocated to Orange County (Santa Ana, CA) for a few years.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
In 2009, we threw away, gave away, or sold almost everything we had. We packed 15 duffle bags, three bicycle boxes, and four small boxes; hopped on the Amtrack Texas Eagle... and three days later we were living in Fort Worth, Texas (DFW Metroplex, Roanoke, TX).</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
As I write this (May 2016) we are feeling the still small voice, and we are starting plans to move to North Idaho (Coeur d'Alene, ID here we come) in the next year or so.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Because I actually lived in the panhandle of Texas as a small child (6-9) I used to tell people in California I was from Texas.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Now that I had lived in Texas it is painfully obviously I am a So Cal kid at heart. Now the call of the mountain lakes and rivers of North Idaho beacons... who knows what other crazy adventures are on the horizon...&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Follow this blog and I'll take you with me.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div>
<b>Darrell Wolfe</b></div>
<div>
Story Teller | INFJ | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Input | Multipotentialite</div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
